failure_message: Three attempts: (1) raw ONNX - node 667 Pow(x,3) in GELU unsupported on QNN HTP; (2) onnx-simplified - same node 667; (3) Pow->Mul rewrite - moves failure to node 679 (another Mul in GELU). Root cause: this specific BERT-Squad-10 export uses ops QNN HTP delegate rejects. Fix: re-export from HuggingFace Optimum with --opset 17 and device-aware GELU fusion — Phase C work.
